steps.title: Use the engineering standard
steps.content: Fabry says human workers are imperfect, too expensive, and not effective. When he says the human machine no longer "answers" the requirements of modern engineering, he means it no longer meets what modern engineering demands.

steps.title: Choose the meets-requirements meaning
steps.content: A means explains, but requirements are not being clarified. B means rebuts, but requirements are not claims to disprove. C means defends, which is not the issue. The needed meaning is satisfies or meets. The answer is D.
